summary: Column-level source-to-target mapping for retail sales star schema with direct, lookup, and derived transformations.

business_alignment.business_purpose: Provide auditable lineage from source CSV data to dimensional warehouse targets.
target_metrics_supported: Customer Lifetime Value by Loyalty Tier
business_alignment.mapping_completeness_target: 100% of required target columns mapped or explicitly documented

mappings.transform_business_logic: Carry source transaction identifier as fact primary key.
Lookup surrogate key in dim_customer by customer_id.
mappings.pseudo_sql_logic: JOIN dim_customer dc ON src.customer_id = dc.customer_id; SELECT dc.customer_key
mappings.notes: Reject or quarantine unmatched business keys

mappings.transform_business_logic: Lookup surrogate key in dim_product by product_id.
mappings.pseudo_sql_logic: JOIN dim_product dp ON src.product_id = dp.product_id; SELECT dp.product_key

mappings.transform_business_logic: Convert source date to YYYYMMDD integer calendar key.
Use source total amount and reconcile with quantity * unit_price.
mappings.notes: Data quality check compares against derived value

mappings.transform_business_logic: Profit is derived as total_amount - (quantity * unit_cost).

quality_controls.description: transaction_id must be unique in fact_sales
quality_controls.sql_check: SELECT transaction_id, COUNT(*) FROM fact_sales GROUP BY transaction_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

quality_controls.description: Source and target total_amount aggregates should reconcile
quality_controls.sql_check: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM sample_sales; SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM fact_sales

quality_controls.description: All surrogate keys in fact_sales must resolve to dimensions
quality_controls.sql_check: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_sales fs LEFT JOIN dim_customer dc ON fs.customer_key = dc.customer_key WHERE dc.customer_key IS NULL

assumptions: All dimension tables are loaded before fact_sales.
Natural keys in source files are stable for this phase.
Payment and store dimensions can be derived from transaction distinct values.
open_risks: Template coverage counts are based on current phase-1 target subset.
Additional unmapped attributes may appear after store master enrichment.
